summary: Completed testing of Shopify Store Analyzer (public tool) and Competitor Store Tracker (auth-required feature). All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified: (1) ShopifyAnalyzerPage at /tools/shopify-analyzer renders with URL input, analyze button, shows real results for allbirds.com with product count, categories, price range, newest products (2) FreeToolsPage at /tools shows Shopify Analyzer link card at top with gradient design (3) CompetitorTrackerPage at /competitor-tracker shows tracked stores list (allbirds.com with 250 products, categories, price range) with Add Store, Refresh, Delete buttons (4) Sidebar navigation includes 'Competitors' link that navigates to /competitor-tracker
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/tools/analyze-store with 'allbirds.com' returns 200 with product_count, store_size, categories, price_range, newest_products
Backend: POST /api/tools/analyze-store with 'gymshark.com' returns 200
Backend: POST /api/tools/analyze-store normalizes URL (handles https:// prefix)
Backend: POST /api/tools/analyze-store with invalid URL returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/tools/analyze-store with non-Shopify store (google.com) returns 400 error
Backend: GET /api/competitor-stores requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/competitor-stores requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/competitor-stores returns list of tracked stores for authenticated user
Backend: POST /api/competitor-stores with duplicate store returns 400 'already tracking'
Backend: POST /api/competitor-stores adds new store with initial scan data (product_count, categories, price_range)
Backend: POST /api/competitor-stores/{id}/refresh re-scans store and returns updated data
Backend: POST /api/competitor-stores/{id}/refresh with invalid id returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/competitor-stores/{id} removes tracked store
Backend: DELETE /api/competitor-stores/{id} with invalid id returns 404
Backend: Plan limits enforced for competitor stores (free=2, starter=5, pro=15, elite=unlimited)
Frontend: FreeToolsPage (/tools) shows Shopify Store Analyzer link card with Store icon, gradient background
Frontend: ShopifyAnalyzerPage (/tools/shopify-analyzer) renders with URL input, Analyze button, feature cards
Frontend: ShopifyAnalyzerPage shows analysis results including store overview, price range, categories, newest products
Frontend: ShopifyAnalyzerPage has CTA button 'Start Tracking with TrendScout'
Frontend: CompetitorTrackerPage (/competitor-tracker) loads for authenticated users
Frontend: CompetitorTrackerPage shows tracked store card (Allbirds - 250 products, 4 categories, $95.26 avg)
Frontend: CompetitorTrackerPage has Add Store button, Refresh button, Delete button
Frontend: Sidebar navigation includes 'Competitors' link with Radar icon
Frontend: Clicking 'Competitors' nav link navigates to /competitor-tracker
seed_data_creation: None - testuser_phase_c@test.com already has allbirds.com tracked as competitor store
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Shopify Analyzer and Competitor Tracker features fully tested. (1) /api/tools/analyze-store is PUBLIC (no auth) - fetches real Shopify /products.json data from any store URL. Returns product_count, store_size, categories, price_range, newest_products, top_vendors, analysis assessment. (2) /api/competitor-stores endpoints require auth - GET list, POST add (with initial scan), POST {id}/refresh, DELETE {id}. Plan limits: free=2, starter=5, pro=15, elite=unlimited. (3) ShopifyAnalyzerPage uses LandingLayout (public). CompetitorTrackerPage uses DashboardLayout (auth required). (4) testuser_phase_c@test.com (free plan) has 1 competitor store tracked: allbirds.com. (5) Real Shopify stores to test: allbirds.com, gymshark.com, bombas.com, colourpop.com. (6) Sidebar nav includes 'Competitors' with Radar icon linking to /competitor-tracker.

Shopify Store Analyzer API.details: Returns product_count, store_size, categories (up to 10), price_range (min/max/avg), newest_products (5), top_vendors, analysis assessment

Competitor Stores List API.details: Returns stores array with id, url, domain, name, product_count, categories, price_range, last_scan_at

Add Competitor Store API.details: Creates new tracked store with initial scan. Returns store doc. Enforces plan limits.

Refresh Competitor Store API.details: Re-scans store, updates product_count, categories, price_range, tracks product_change

ShopifyAnalyzerPage UI.details: URL input, Analyze button, results show store overview (4 stat cards), price analysis bar, categories grid, vendors grid, newest products list, CTA

FreeToolsPage Analyzer Card.details: Shopify Store Analyzer link card at top with Store icon, emerald-teal gradient, arrow icon

CompetitorTrackerPage UI.details: Header with Add Store button, store cards with metrics, categories badges, refresh/delete actions, time since last scan

Sidebar Competitors Nav.details: Competitors link with Radar icon, navigates to /competitor-tracker

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - analyzer fetches real data from Shopify store /products.json endpoints
